title: The Length of His Caliphate
description: According to Ahmad b. Thabit (al-Razr) Ishaq b. 'Isis-Abd Ma'shar:913 'All's caliphate was five years, all but three months. According to al-Harith-Ibn Sa'd-Muhammad b. Umar: 'All's caliphate was five years, all but three months. According to Abfl Zayd-Abu al-Hasan: 'All's rule was four years, nine months and a day-or several days.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 17
